name: arcane-os-machine-bundle
description: Arcane OS WebView2/WebKitGTK shell and provisioner with Node native abstraction over framed IPC.

scripts.smoke: node tools/smoke-test-frontend-bridge.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-provisioner-partial-retry.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-windows-adapter.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-capability-policy.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-api-concurrency.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-rpc.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-user-transaction.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-broker.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-signature.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-encryption.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-tag-length.mjs && node tools/verify-privilege-boundary-source.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-release-integrity.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-installed-integrity.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-runtime-isolation.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-command-hardening.mjs
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run verify && npm run smoke && npm run test:app-packager && npm run build:apps:portable && npm run verify:apps
scripts.check:windows: npm run build:win && npm run build:apps:windows && npm run verify:apps && npm run verify:app-catalog && npm run verify:windispatch
scripts.prepush: npm run check && npm run check:windows
scripts.build:win: npm run verify:winhost && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/build-windows-release.ps1
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:core:linux && bash tools/build-linux-webkitgtk.sh
